hero.badge: Effortless team management right from your phone
hero.title1: For solo swimmers and teams alike —
hero.description: Manage practice logs, race results, proxy entry, and meet registrations — all in one app. Get started instantly on mobile or browser.

features.feature1Desc: Record intervals, rep counts, sets, and times. Set clear goals for your next session — add one more rep, shorten your interval by 5 seconds, or improve your average time.
features.feature2Desc: Log event, time, pool length, and split times. Your personal best table updates automatically. Short course, long course, and relay data are all captured.
features.feature3Title: Coaches & Managers Can Enter on Behalf of Athletes
features.feature3Desc: Practice and race records can be registered in bulk by coaches or managers, not just athletes. Records are tied to the individual, so they keep accumulating even after leaving the team.
features.feature3Item1: Bulk entry by coaches and managers
features.feature3Item2: Records stay with the athlete forever
features.scannerDesc: Let AI read your handwritten practice sheets and skip the manual entry.
features.scannerLongDesc1: Logging your practice afterwards is tedious. With SwimHub Scanner, just snap a photo of your handwritten practice sheet and AI digitizes it for you.
features.scannerLongDesc2: Whether it's a sheet from your coach or notes you wrote yourself, you can import them as is — saving you a huge amount of typing.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Two simple plans. Start for free, no credit card required.

cta.title: Start tracking your swims today
cta.subtitle: Creating an account is free. Get started right away.
cta.body: No team? No problem. Start solo and add team features whenever you're ready.

family.title: SwimHub App Family
family.subtitle: A suite of tools to make swimming easier
family.timerDesc: Play swim videos with a stopwatch overlay. Perfect for stroke analysis and lap checks.
family.scannerDesc: AI digitizes your handwritten practice records, drastically reducing data entry.

footer.tagline: The all-in-one record management platform for swimmers

pricing.metaDesc: View SwimHub pricing plans. Free plan covers the basics. Premium is ¥500/month or ¥5,000/year for unlimited everything, with a 7-day free trial.
pricing.ogDescription: SwimHub pricing. Start free, unlock all features with Premium. ¥500/month or ¥5,000/year.
pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, then upgrade to Premium when you need it. Try all features free for 7 days.

freePlan.name: Free
freePlan.feature5: PracticeTime: up to 18 per practice log

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Will I be charged during the free trial?
faq.a1: No. You won't be charged during the 7-day free trial. As long as you cancel before the trial ends, no fee will be charged.
faq.q2: What's the difference between annual and monthly billing?
faq.a2: The annual plan costs ¥5,000/year, which is two months (¥1,000) cheaper than the monthly plan (¥500/month × 12 = ¥6,000/year).
faq.q3: Can I change my plan later?
faq.a3: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. You can manage your plan from the settings screen.
faq.q4: Can I use SwimHub Scanner and SwimHub Timer too?
faq.a4: Yes. With SwimHub Premium, the paid features of SwimHub Scanner and SwimHub Timer are also included in a unified subscription.

cta.title: Get started for free today
cta.subtitle: Creating an account is free. Try all features with a 7-day free trial.

goalSetCalculator.descriptionBody: is used to calculate the average target time required for the goal set (50m × 6 reps × 3 sets) to achieve your target time.
